title: LLP Registration in Bangalore | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan
description: Register an LLP in Bangalore with Virtual Auditor. Expert CA-assisted FiLLiP filing, customised LLP Agreement. Fixed-fee pricing. Call +91-95139 39333.
bodyText:
Looking for LLP registration in Bangalore? Virtual Auditor provides end-to-end Limited Liability Partnership registration in Bangalore, led by CA V. Viswanathan — Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA) and Associate Company Secretary (ACS). We handle name reservation, partner documentation, and MCA filing.

What is LLP Registration?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Certificate of Incorporation as LLP from the Registrar of Companies (ROC Bangalore). LLPIN allotment and PAN/TAN for the LLP. Customised LLP Agreement covering profit-sharing, capital contributions, decision-making rights, admission/retirement of partners, and dispute resolution. DSC and DPIN for all designated partners. Post-registration compliance calendar — Form 11 (annual return), Form 8 (statement of accounts), and income tax return deadlines.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for LLP Registration in Bangalore
  Bangalore's professional services and technology ecosystem makes LLP a popular structure for consultancies, law firms, CA practices, and technology partnerships. Virtual Auditor understands when LLP is the right choice vs Pvt Ltd — we advise based on your specific situation, not a one-size-fits-all recommendation. Our Bangalore office at 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road provides in-person consultations and local ROC coordination. CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS) drafts every LLP Agreement from scratch, incorporating partner-specific provisions for capital lock-in, non-compete clauses, and IP assignment that template agreements miss. Our dual qualification means both company law and tax implications are addressed in a single engagement.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Free consultation — LLP vs Pvt Ltd advisory, partner structure planning, capital contribution design. Step 2: DSC and DPIN procurement for all designated partners. Step 3: Name reservation through RUN-LLP on MCA portal. Step 4: LLP Agreement drafting with customised clauses for your business. Step 5: FiLLiP filing with MCA for incorporation. Step 6: Certificate of Incorporation — 5-8 working days from filing. Step 7: Form 3 filing (LLP Agreement), PAN/TAN, bank account, and compliance setup.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Ready to register your LLP in Bangalore? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-95139 39333
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road, Bangalore 560001
  Fixed-fee pricing. LLP Certificate typically in 5-8 working days.

faqs.q: How long does LLP registration take in Bangalore?
faqs.a: 5-8 working days from FiLLiP filing. Total timeline including DPIN and name reservation: 8-12 working days. We provide a clear project timeline at the start.

faqs.q: Is audit mandatory for an LLP in Bangalore?
faqs.a: No. LLP audit is mandatory only if turnover exceeds Rs 40 lakhs or partner contribution exceeds Rs 25 lakhs. Below these thresholds, only annual return (Form 11) and statement of accounts (Form 8) are required.

faqs.q: What is the cost of LLP registration in Bangalore?
faqs.a: Our fixed fee covers DPIN, DSC, name reservation, FiLLiP filing, LLP Agreement drafting, and government fees. Contact us at +91-95139 39333 for a transparent quote with no hidden charges.
